testcase.name: test_agent_workflow_post_then_get_returns_completed_steps_with_handoffs_and_route_trace

failure.message: AssertionError: API call failed after retries for POST /runs/2baffd1a-8927-4dc9-9b8c-55e043045fa5/agent-workflow: Transient upstream status 502

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_priority_d_agent_workflow_runtime.py:97: in test_agent_workflow_post_then_get_returns_completed_steps_with_handoffs_and_route_trace post_response = api_call_with_retry(api_client, "POST", f"/runs/{run_id}/agent-workflow", json=workflow_payload, timeout=180) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ backend/tests/test_priority_d_agent_workflow_runtime.py:42: in api_call_with_retry raise AssertionError(f"API call failed after retries for {method} {path}: {last_error}") E AssertionError: API call failed after retries for POST /runs/2baffd1a-8927-4dc9-9b8c-55e043045fa5/agent-workflow: Transient upstream status 502

testcase.name: test_agent_workflow_current_run_memory_does_not_leak_other_run_objective_markers
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_priority_d_agent_workflow_runtime.py:160: in test_agent_workflow_current_run_memory_does_not_leak_other_run_objective_markers assert post_response.status_code == 200 E assert 400 == 200 E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code
